title: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises!
